heading: Annual reports: type for reports of executive officers
label: 1112 Annual reports: type for reports of executive officers
text: The annual reports of executive officers shall be printed in the same type and form as the report of the head of the department which it accompanies, unless otherwise ordered by the Joint Committee on Printing.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 222 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 9128 Stat. 623
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 222 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 9128 Stat. 623
